schema.ion.id › core › tax › v1

core/tax/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/tax/v1#  |  Layer: L4 — Cross-sector core  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

IONTaxDetail

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/core/tax/v1#IONTaxDetail

PropertyMandatoryDescription
taxRegimeoptionalPPN: Pajak Pertambahan Nilai (VAT), standard 11%. PPNBM: Pajak Penjualan atas Barang Mewah (luxury goods tax). PPH22: In
taxCategoryoptionalBKP: Barang Kena Pajak — taxable goods. JKP: Jasa Kena Pajak — taxable services. NON_BKP: Non-taxable goods or services.
taxRateconditionalTax rate as decimal fraction. The applicable rate MUST be sourced from current Indonesian tax regulation (DJP / PMK), no
taxAmountconditionalCalculated tax amount in IDR
taxIncludedalwaysWhether the tax amount is already included in the item price (tax-inclusive pricing) or added on top (tax-exclusive).
eFakturRefoptionale-Invoice reference (Faktur Pajak) number from DJP e-Faktur system. Format: XXX.XXX-YY.XXXXXXXX where XXX is kode faktur
taxBaseAmountconditionalThe amount on which tax is calculated (before tax)

Pack README

ion-core/tax/v1

Indonesian tax detail — PPN, PPnBM, PPh regimes. BKP/JKP/NON_BKP classification.

Attaches to

`beckn:Consideration.considerationAttributes`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/core/tax/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
